## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.2

### 🔔 Notifications
- Hardens the camera notification blueprint so stale or string-valued event data cannot crash the template.
- Keeps manual blueprint runs on the selected event entity's latest real recording data.

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Adds a Home Assistant repair warning when an imported X-Sense camera notification blueprint is out of date.
- The repair points users back to the current blueprint import and tells them to re-save automations that use the old blueprint copy.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for stale blueprint detection, repair issue creation/clearing, and safe blueprint event-data templates.
- Confirms recording cache tests still preserve the recordings panel link separately from cached media.
